runners.spotlight: Beaten only narrowly in a Grade 2 at Churchill Downs 35 days ago; admirably consistent and a proven winner with a career wins-runs record of 6-12.
runners.comment: Favourite and just beaten last month; normally pretty consistent.

runners.name: Twenty Six Black
runners.spotlight: Good effort when close up at Belmont At The Big A five weeks ago in an allowance listed; producing consistent form; on target twice in his last four outings; good record under Manuel Franco (partnership reunited here).
runners.comment: Just denied last month; managed two wins in his last four outings.

runners.name: John The Beer Man
runners.spotlight: Bagged a hat-trick last time and has not had much racing; scored by just over 2l at Aqueduct over 6f (allowance optional claimer, yielding) 42 days ago.
runners.comment: Emerged on top six weeks ago; three from five in his career so far.

runners.name: Clock Tower
runners.spotlight: Has managed three wins from ten career runs; finished just behind Twenty Six Black when third at Belmont At The Big A over 6f (allowance listed) last month.
runners.comment: Narrowly beaten last month; successful three times from ten career runs.

runners.name: Works For Me
runners.spotlight: Scored by a slim margin in an allowance race (Keeneland) 49 days ago; winning form over C&D; has chalked up three wins from his last six; also engaged in race 10 at Churchill Downs.
runners.comment: Won by slim margin 49 days ago; has chalked up three wins from his last six.
runners.owner: KatieRich Stables LLC, Christopher Connors & Lawrence Appel

runners.name: My Boy Prince
runners.spotlight: Good effort when beaten into fourth by a neck (close behind Litigation) at Churchill Downs last month in a Grade 2; admirable career strike-rate (nine from 24 to date); ought to give it a shot if replicating his best form.
runners.comment: Likely to be in contention based on the pick of his form.

runners.name: Bold Journey
runners.spotlight: Career record shows his ability to win (wins-runs record of 8-33); not disgraced when third at Keeneland 50 days ago in an allowance optional claimer.
runners.comment: Held in third 50 days ago; admirable career strike-rate (eight from 33 to date).
runners.owner: Pantofel Stable LLC, Wachtel Stable & Gary Barber

races.race_name: Woody Stephens Stakes Presented By Mohegan Sun (Grade 1) (Dirt)

runners.name: Crude Velocity
runners.spotlight: Scored by just under 4l at Churchill Downs last month in a Grade 2; unbeaten after three career runs and has looked a good prospect in winning all starts to date; the trainer has enjoyed plenty of winners of late; he has a shout.
runners.comment: Has to be taken seriously; unbeaten; has to be rated as an interesting prospect.

runners.name: Taj Mahal
runners.spotlight: Held when tenth of 14 at Laurel Park 21 days ago in an allowance Grade 1; has made an impressive start to his career with three wins from four starts; down in distance.
runners.comment: Held when tenth last month; has made a pleasing start to his career with three wins from four starts.
runners.owner: SF Racing LLC, Starlight Racing Et Al

runners.name: Solitude Dude
runners.spotlight: Gained a 2l success in an allowance listed at Aqueduct 49 days ago; has won four of his five career starts.
runners.comment: On target 49 days ago; has made a pleasing start to his career with four wins from five starts.

runners.name: Gilded Bandit
runners.spotlight: Has won two of his three career starts and out to complete a hat-trick; came out on top by 2 1/2l at Churchill Downs five weeks ago in an allowance optional claimer.
runners.comment: Emerged on top last month; winner of two of his three career starts.

runners.name: Obliteration
runners.spotlight: Got the job done by 3 1/2l at Laurel Park three weeks ago in an allowance listed; a previous winner here; attempts to land a hat-trick; likely to be thereabouts.
runners.comment: Likely to be in contention; 3 1/2l winner last month.
runners.owner: Leland Ackerley Racing LLC, James Sherwood et al

runners.name: Six Speed
runners.spotlight: Was 13th of 18 on his debut over 1m2f at Churchill Downs at 40-1 five weeks ago; improvement certainly not ruled out; related to Stakes winner Pipit; now tackles shorter distance; entitled to have come on for that run.
runners.comment: Put in his place in the Kentucky Derby last month; related to Stakes winner Pipit.
runners.owner: Black Type Thoroughbreds, Brunetti Dugan Stables Et Al

runners.name: Englishman
runners.spotlight: Winner of two of his three career starts and nicely bred (by Maxfield); behind Crude Velocity over 1m at Churchill Downs (Grade 2) when second (sent off 13-8) last month; looks likely to be involved.
runners.comment: Should be thereabouts; minor honours at 13-8 last month.

runners.name: Stradale
runners.spotlight: Was a close runner-up (Oaklawn Park) last month in a black type; successful twice in his last four starts; tried over an additional 1f now.
runners.comment: Just denied at 2-5 last month; has chalked up two wins from his last four.

runners.name: Civil Liberty
runners.spotlight: Gained a 3l success at Keeneland when getting off the mark at the fifth time of asking two months ago in a maiden special weight; has arguably shown improved form the last twice; booking of Antonio Fresu takes the eye.
runners.comment: 3l winner two months ago; has raised his game the last twice.

races.race_name: Hill 'N' Dale Metropolitan Handicap (Grade 1) (Dirt)

runners.name: Knightsbridge
runners.spotlight: Dominated Grade 3 series for older milers at Gulfstream around turn of year in outstanding times; disappointing in Grade 1 at Churchill Downs in May, finding little in straight (has had career punctuated by layoffs); could bounce back, but hard to see past that last run on first Saratoga outing.
runners.comment: Hacked up in three Grade 3s at Gulfstream this winter, but poor sixth in Grade 1 last time

runners.name: Journalism
runners.spotlight: Won three Grade 1s in 2025, including Preakness Stakes at Pimlico (1m1.5f) in May and Haskell Stakes at Monmouth Park (1m1f) in July; also good fourth in Breeders' Cup Classic at Del Mar last November; fair third to White Abarrio in strong Grade 2 at Oaklawn on return, duelling with top-class Sovereignty until tiring last 1f (gave trouble stalls); should be spot on this time.
runners.comment: Won three Grade 1s in 2025; shaped well in strong race on return; should be spot on
runners.owner: Bridlewood Farm, Don Alberto Stable Et Al

runners.name: Saudi Crown
runners.spotlight: Has tons of early pace and has won half of 18 starts; in good form at present, successful in Grade 3 Commonwealth Stakes at Keeneland (7f) in April by 3l, pressing pace and surging clear despite covering extra ground; stays a mile but not quite at this level nowadays (Grade 1 winner in 2023 but form figures 0305 at this level since).
runners.comment: In good form versus lesser but tends to struggle at this level now (form 0305 last four)

runners.name: Nysos
runners.spotlight: Developed into high-class miler in 2025, winning Breeders' Cup Dirt Mile at Del Mar in November; career-best effort when 1l second to Forever Young in Grade 1 Saudi Cup at Riyadh last time (1m1f), always prominent and battling on well; first start at Saratoga, gives weight all round and rails draw restricts his tactical options, but still tough to beat (seven wins and two seconds from nine starts) in any circumstances.
runners.comment: high-class horse; excellent 1l second to Forever Young in Grade 1 Saudi Cup; big chance

runners.name: Vibe
runners.spotlight: Looked excellent prospect in winning maiden (by 10l) and allowance race at Gulfstream, then another allowance at Churchill Downs last May; most impressive in last-named event, turning away one rival then surging 3l clear of another with great gusto; smart colt in the making but faces very stiff task, even getting weight; late subsritute for same connections' very smart Disruptor.
runners.comment: Completed hat-trick of minor races with 3l allowance score at Churchill Downs; stiff task
runners.owner: Repole Stable, West Point Thoroughbreds Et Al

runners.name: Antiquarian
runners.spotlight: Very smart form, strong at finish, when winning incident-packed Grade 1 Jockey Club Gold Cup here (1m2f) last August and Grade 3 Westchester Stakes at Aqueduct (1m, hung left) in May; eighth in Breeders' Cup Classic in between; seems to be improving with age and not to be dismissed.
runners.comment: Grade 1 winner (1m2f) here last August and Grade 3 winner (1m) on return; place claims

runners.name: Rated By Merit
runners.spotlight: Won first five starts in restricted races in 2024 (clocked standout juvenile times) and 2025; second favourite, first defeat when 3l fourth to Point Dume in Grade 2 Carter Stakes at Aqueduct in April (hit gate); given time to get over that run (scratched from Westchester May 3) but faces stiff task in this league.
runners.comment: Won first five in minor races in 2024/25; useful fourth in Grade 2 on return; big ask

races.race_name: Resorts World Casino Manhattan Stakes (Grade 1) (Turf)

runners.name: Integration
runners.spotlight: Six wins from 17 starts include Grade 2s in 2023 and 2024; largely consistent since (beaten head by Deterministic in this race last year) and won allowance at Aqueduct last time (9.5f) by half a length from useful Risk Tolerance, travelling well; can reach a place, if all goes well.
runners.comment: Second in this race last year and warmed up with Aqueduct allowance win; place claims
runners.owner: West Point Thoroughbreds & Woodford Racing LLC

runners.name: Rhetorical
runners.spotlight: Very smart at up to 1m1f, winner of Grade 1 Turf Mile at Keeneland and Grade 1 Turf Classic at Churchill Downs, on latter occasion clearing 3l away from Make Me King with something in hand after dictating the pace; a high-class gelding in the form of his life but has plenty of speed and tackles a slightly longer trip.
runners.comment: Dual Grade 1 winner, including at Churchill Downs (beat Make Me King by 3l); solid chance
runners.owner: Gary Barber, Cheyenne Stable LLC & Wachtel Stable

runners.name: Deterministic
runners.spotlight: Very smart around this distance and goes well here (form figures 1311 include winning this race last year and Grade 1 Fourstardave last August); on five-timer after winning Grade 3 Fort Marcy Stakes at Aqueduct for second consecutive year, travelling strongly and always holding Battle Of Normandy (received 4lb) by around 1l; sure to make a sound repeat bid.
runners.comment: Form figures 1311 here with two Grade 1 wins, including this last year; Grade 3 win latest
runners.owner: St Elias Stable, Ken Langone Et Al

runners.name: Make Me King
runners.spotlight: Smart form at around this distance; won in Qatar in February before career-best effort to chase home 3l winner Rhetorical in Grade 1 at Churchill Downs (1m1f) latest, his first start in US; experienced around the globe and tactically versatile but needs to improve again to prevail.
runners.comment: Improved form when 3l second to Rhetorical in Grade 1 at Churchill Downs; still needs more

runners.name: Test Score
runners.spotlight: Benefited from excellent ride from Manny Franco when winning Grade 1 Pegasus World Cup Invitational at Gulfstream in January (1m1f, firm) by a neck; well beaten under similar conditions three months later (raced wide behind slow pace); something to prove now, but progressive prior to latest run.
runners.comment: Won Grade 1 at Gulfstream in January (1m1f) but poor run three months later; could rebound

runners.name: Bright Picture
runners.spotlight: French-trained gelding who is thriving at present; winner of Group 3 Prix Exbury at Saint-Cloud in March and Group 2 Prix Harcourt at Longchamp in April, both on ground slower than good; solid second to Daryz in slow-paced Group 1 Prix Ganay (10.5f, good) on latest start, running on strongly from rear in wake of imperious winner; strong chance, especially with Flavien Prat booked.
runners.comment: French-trained 5yo; won Group 3 and Group 2 before second to Daryz in Group 1; big chance.

runners.name: Tiz Dashing
runners.spotlight: Improved form, suited by strong pace, when gaining second Grade 3 win in 8.5f Canadian Turf at Gulfstream Park on reappearance in February by nearly 4l; last of seven in Grade 1 Maker's Mark Mile at Keeneland subsequently, unsuited by slow pace; better than last run but needs to improve sharply.
runners.comment: Won Grade 3 at Gulfstream in February; unsuited by slow pace latest; stiff task here

runners.name: Battle Of Normandy
runners.spotlight: Five career wins include Grade 3 River City Stakes at Churchill Downs last November; placed on all three starts this season, second in Grade 3s to Tiz Dashing at Gulfstream and Deterministic at Aqueduct, both times comfortably held; form does not seem at this level.
runners.comment: Grade 3 winner, second in same grade last two starts; does not seem up to this
runners.owner: West Point Thoroughbreds & Woodford Racing LLC

runners.name: One Stripe
runners.spotlight: Ex-South African horse where he was a dual Group 1 winner; second to Test Score in Grade 1 Pegasus World Cup Turf (1m1f) and to Zulu Kingdom in Maker's Mark Mile at Keeneland, not clear run and unable to catch well-ridden winner on latter occasion (beaten under 1l); sound claims of a place, providing he settles, and Gavin Lerena travels from South Africa to ride.
runners.comment: Dual Group 1 winner in South Africa; twice second in same grade in US; sound place claims

runners.name: Panova
runners.spotlight: Let-up (42-days). Won in decisive fashion at Morphettville. Since trialled at Warwick Farm 25 May. Unexposed at trip.

runners.name: Paltrow Miss
runners.spotlight: Let-up (42-days). Early form good. Solid performance in defeat in the Australasian Oaks at Morphettville. Should relish the rise in distance.
runners.owner: A Kheir, B J O'Brien Et Al

runners.name: Fireball Miss
runners.spotlight: Strong win over 2000m The Roses 3yo at Doomben. Rise to 2200m a new challenge. Others with more appeal.
runners.owner: Bennett Racing Pty Ltd, P King Et Al

runners.name: Soverato
runners.spotlight: Made late rally from the back at Doomben. Deep into her campaign and has some claims.
runners.owner: O T I Racing, A Berry Et Al

runners.name: Grand Omaha
runners.spotlight: Off pace, solid through line The Roses 3yo at Doomben. Unexposed at trip. Goes into wider exotics.
runners.owner: D R Brideoake, P Green Et Al

runners.name: Chispa
runners.spotlight: Latest conquest 3yo+ (Bm64) at Randwick-Kensington 13 May. Came home hot on their heels to grab second The Roses 3yo at Doomben. Unexposed at trip. Goes into wider exotics.

runners.name: Single Red
runners.spotlight: Great effort in the Gold Coast Bracelet Gold Coast two back. Reasonable effort without seriously threatening at Doomben. Brings pace and stamina. Prefers cut in the track.
runners.owner: Oti Racing, B Kwok Et Al

runners.name: Parvenu
runners.spotlight: Annexed the 3yo (Bm70) at Caulfield Heath 29 Apr. Gave solid chase in a good effort at Doomben. Rise to 2200m a new challenge. Goes into wider exotics.
runners.owner: D M D B & A D S K, J Savoria Et Al

runners.name: Silvasista
runners.spotlight: Fresh. Won a 2800m Open at Flemington two back. Failed to threaten in rain affected going at Morphettville over a longer assignment. Since trialled at Sunshine Coast Inner 26 May.
runners.owner: Peachester Lodge Pty Ltd, S Disch Et Al

runners.name: Zuleika
runners.spotlight: Sent out $31 when unable to threaten at Doomben. Others carry more punch.
runners.owner: Kratzie Racing No 105, Kratzie Racing No 106 Et Al

runners.name: Fringes
runners.spotlight: Freshened. Annexed the 3yo+ Plate (C1) at Balaklava 15 Apr. Won from just off the pace-setters at Morphettville. Drops to shorter trip.
runners.owner: Dynamic Syndications Racing, D W Watt Et Al

runners.name: Norty Forty
runners.spotlight: Scrubbed up from the wide gate and boxed on bravely for a 0.2 len win at Ipswich. Stiffer challenge here.
runners.owner: Mrs B Stewart, Ms P M A McGovern & Mrs S Hammer

runners.name: Panda's Spectrum
runners.spotlight: Freshened. Sent forward, outgunned late but kept boxing on at Morphettville over a longer test. Switching to 2200m. Hard to make a case.
runners.owner: P S Wilton & A D Burton

runners.name: Tarntanya
runners.spotlight: Went close at Caulfield 9 May. Started $26 when safely held in Open company at Doomben. Others are packing more punch.

runners.name: Crathie Kirk
runners.spotlight: Did little at Doomben. Unexposed at trip. Others more persuasive.
runners.owner: E C Throsby, Vinery Stud Syndicate Et Al

runners.name: Solid Gold
runners.spotlight: On a short back-up. Started $4.40 when battled home in Open company this venue. Any give helps. Drops to shorter trip.

runners.name: Sheeza Diva
runners.spotlight: Put in some good work late at Randwick. New to Eagle Farm. Improved latest but form remains suspect.
runners.owner: Mrs D A Kearney, Ms L R Pejic Et Al

runners.name: Highgrove Rose
runners.spotlight: Midfield, great effort running into second (Bm78) at Doomben over this distance. Shapes as a rough place prospect.
runners.owner: Jack Bruce Racing, Sneesby Racing (G Sneesby) Et Al

runners.name: Kickuphigh
runners.spotlight: Never sighted at Gold Coast. First real test of stamina here. Leaning towards others.
runners.owner: Mrs C M Mayne & N C Mayne

runners.name: Polo
runners.spotlight: Rearward in transit then rattled home late to prevail final stages at Hawkesbury. First real test of stamina here. Strikes a harder race.

runners.name: Pink Vixen
runners.spotlight: Handily placed but lacked the necessary pick-up at Gold Coast. Stamina on trial here. Leaning towards others.
runners.owner: Miss V L Thompson, Mrs J H Kemp & Ms C Kowalchuk

runners.name: Angel City
runners.spotlight: Out the back, closed with raking strides in the 3yo (Bm72) at Randwick. First real test of stamina here. Can't enthuse.
runners.owner: MCS Racing, A B Tall Et Al

runners.name: Manaal
runners.spotlight: First-up (12-weeks). Proven fresh and looks fit for return to racing. Nice gate. At optimum distance.

runners.name: Uncommon James
runners.spotlight: Last win was 25 Feb 2023. Not disgraced in Doomben 10,000 at Doomben at this trip at $68. Home track advantage but awkwardly drawn. Looking elsewhere.

runners.name: Zou Sensation
runners.spotlight: Handy and acquitted himself fairly well at Scone. Will be fitter second-up. A distance specialist. Has some claims.
runners.owner: Bennett Racing Pty Ltd (N Bennett), D Hardie Et Al

runners.name: Chidiac
runners.spotlight: Freshened. In touch and fought on dauntlessly at Hawkesbury. Drawn to receive every chance. Makes strong appeal.

runners.name: In Flight
runners.spotlight: Now 5 weeks between runs. Won the Sapphire Stakes at Randwick two back 11 Apr. Never a threat after showing no early speed from the barriers this track over this trip. Since impressed with a Warwick Farm trial win 25 May.
runners.owner: Proven Thoroughbreds, Ms K A Tibbey Et Al

runners.name: Hidden Wealth
runners.spotlight: Battled home at Doomben. Form sound at this course and journey and under less weight. Right in the mix.
runners.owner: Wessel Thoroughbreds, M A McLean Et Al

runners.name: King Of Sparta
runners.spotlight: Warmed up nicely late at Scone at first run off a long break following market easing. Strips fitter second run back. Could add some value to exotics.
runners.owner: Yarraman Park Stud, Grant Bloodstock Pty Ltd Syndicate Et Al

runners.name: The Inflictor
runners.spotlight: Got the wobbles late after leading at Doomben. Could add some value to exotics.
runners.owner: A K Turner, Mrs M A Turner Et Al

runners.name: Boomtown Boss
runners.spotlight: Placed The Archer at Rockhampton 5 May. Raced in back half and was never in a position to mount a serious challenge at Doomben. At optimum distance. Sharper now and can play a role.
runners.owner: Wessel Thoroughbreds, R H Morrison Et Al

runners.name: Esjay
runners.spotlight: Got back and wasn't totally disgraced in choppy conditions at Doomben in second run from spell. Others carry more punch.
runners.owner: G J Wippell, Mrs H G Wippell Et Al

runners.name: Metalart
runners.spotlight: Sent out $21 when unable to threaten at Doomben at second run back. Others with stronger claims.
runners.owner: M K Kamp, Miss K A Fuller Et Al

runners.name: Oak Hill
runners.spotlight: Made late rally from the back at Doomben. New to Eagle Farm. Others more persuasive.
runners.owner: Lindsay Park Bloodstock, R & C Legh Racing(R Legh) Et Al

runners.name: Barber
runners.spotlight: Gave good account Chief De Beers Qlty at Doomben first up. Fitter second-up. Looks up against it.
runners.owner: Monarch Bloodstock, D Micallef Et Al

races.race_name: Hollywoodbets Gold Challenge (Grade 1) (Turf)

runners.name: See It Again
runners.spotlight: Class told when 2/1 and 1st of 9 runners, 0.60 lengths ahead SEE IT AGAIN over 2000m at TURFFONTEIN STANDSIDE on 04 April 26. Champ-hot form-prepping.

runners.name: Tin Pan Alley
runners.spotlight: Slow-carried in 200 when 11/10 and 2nd of 11 runners, 0.90 lengths behind STAR MAJOR over 1600m at GREYVILLE on 02 May 26. Met top horse last -draw?.

runners.name: The Real Prince
runners.spotlight: Prepping when 5/1 and 6th of 9 runners, 2.25 lengths behind QUESTIONING over 1400m at GREYVILLE on 02 May 26. Could be the right race.

runners.name: Gladatorian
runners.spotlight: Ran on-prepping when 16/1 and 2nd of 9 runners, 1.60 lengths behind QUESTIONING over 1400m at GREYVILLE on 02 May 26. 3rd in 2025 - dangerous.
runners.owner: Late Agasthamuni Gujadhur, E G Hart De Keating Et Al

runners.name: Eight On Eighteen
runners.spotlight: Over-raced - tried when 7/2 and 2nd of 6 runners, 0.30 lengths behind OKAVANGO over 1600m at GREYVILLE on 09 May 26. Backed last-getting there.

runners.name: Legal Counsel
runners.spotlight: Squeeze-ran on well when 6/1 and 4th of 9 runners, 1.95 lengths behind QUESTIONING over 1400m at GREYVILLE on 02 May 26. Should have every chance.
runners.owner: Messrs Cameron Braun, E A Braun Et Al

runners.name: Questioning
runners.spotlight: Another solid win when 14/10 and 1st of 9 runners, 1.60 lengths ahead QUESTIONING over 1400m at GREYVILLE on 02 May 26. In top form-now Gr1 1600m.
runners.owner: Greg & Gina Bortz, T Gujadhur & Wernars Family

runners.name: Cosmic Speed
runners.spotlight: One paced finish when 5/1 and 11th of 15 runners, 2.80 lengths behind TAXI TO THE MOON over 1200m at SCOTTSVILLE on 23 May 26. Close up 4th in 2025.
runners.owner: Mrs H Kuhn, Krishen Naidoo & The Hon Justice G N Kruger

runners.name: Fire Attack
runners.spotlight: Carried 300m-got up when 33/10 and 1st of 6 runners, 0.60 lengths ahead FIRE ATTACK over 2000m at TURFFONTEIN STANDSIDE on 28 April 26. Back to best-drawn widest.
runners.owner: G A Basel, G C Cornwall Et Al

runners.name: Dave The King
runners.spotlight: Led - tired late when 2/1 and 3rd of 6 runners, 2.40 lengths behind ZEITZ over 1400m at SCOTTSVILLE on 17 May 26. Won it 2 years in a row!.
runners.owner: L M Nestadt, Gary Player Stud Farm Ltd & Ralphs Racing Ltd

runners.name: Main Defender
runners.spotlight: Shrp shft-hung-V-ND when 28/10 and 5th of 10 runners, 3.50 lengths behind MONEY HEIST over 1400m at TURFFONTEIN STANDSIDE on 10 May 26. Better than latest form.
runners.owner: J J Habib, G Nassif Et Al

runners.name: Jet Force
runners.spotlight: Slow-wide-pull-cut when 6/1 and 7th of 9 runners, 3.35 lengths behind QUESTIONING over 1400m at GREYVILLE on 02 May 26. Useful - can get into it.
runners.owner: Denis Le Breton, A L Taylor Et Al

races.race_name: HKJC World Pool Stakes (Grade 2) (Fillies & Mares) (Turf)

runners.name: One Fine Winter
runners.spotlight: Career record shows her ability to win (wins-runs record of 3-11); came home eighth in the SA Fillies Sprint, beaten 5l at Scottsville 14 days ago; booking of Craig Zackey takes the eye; an easier task than her previous race.

runners.name: Mon Petit Cherie
runners.spotlight: Has won here previously; consistent performer; produced a good effort in the Majorca Stakes to finish third at Kenilworth four months ago upped to 1m; this represents an easier task than her previous race; returns from a break today; she has won after a similar break previously and definite chance.

runners.name: Buttercup Baby
runners.spotlight: Not far behind One Fine Winter when ninth at Scottsville 14 days ago; knows this place inside out (six course wins); this represents an easier task than her previous race.

runners.name: Quickstepgal
runners.spotlight: Likes this combination of C&D; has been fairly consistent lately; went close when second 35 days ago in a Grade 2; competitive shout.

runners.name: Mocha Blend
runners.spotlight: Respectable effort in defeat (beaten 2l) over 1m here (conditions plate) last month; has won at this track; this represents a step up in class but she's an attractive contender.

runners.name: Scarlet Macaw
runners.spotlight: Held in seventh in a Listed race (Kenilworth) two months ago.
runners.owner: Bass Racing Pty Ltd T/A Centenary Syndicate

runners.name: Rachel Wall
runners.spotlight: Was on the premises (third, beaten just over 1l) at Turffontein five weeks ago in a Grade 2; has been consistent of late.

runners.name: Symphony In White
runners.spotlight: Split two of these rivals 41 days ago at Scottsville when not living up to expectations in a Grade 3; has achieved five wins from 20 career runs.

runners.name: Babelicious
runners.spotlight: Beaten 6l when eighth of 11 six weeks ago (Scottsville) in a Grade 3; has achieved five wins from 19 career runs; likely player despite this step up in class.
runners.owner: Team Valor International (Nom : B Irwin) & Mrs Vanashree

runners.name: Lou Lou
runners.spotlight: Has won at this track; not beaten far when third 43 days ago in a Class 5.

runners.name: Care Forgot
runners.spotlight: Gave good account to finish third last month at Turffontein in a stakes race; string of consistent efforts of late; on target twice in her last four outings.

runners.name: That's My Baby
runners.spotlight: Consistent performer and specialist here with three wins; finishing second was a good effort two months ago in a stakes race; held an entry at Turffontein Thursday.

runners.name: Disting
runners.spotlight: Out of the frame (beaten 4l in seventh) at Scottsville over 6f (stakes race) 14 days ago.

races.race_name: Japan Racing Association Derby-Trial (Group 3) (Turf)
